texts.full_text: bromocriptine levels and altered tolerability of the drug. A double-blind randomized study of three different doses 25, 50 and 100 mg of Parlodel LAR. Twenty-one female patients (seven patients/dose) with both tumoral and non-tumoral hyperprolactinaemia.The PRL level was measured at baseline after an overnight fast before the administration i.m., under local anaesthesia in a gluteal muscle, on day 0 of Parlodel LAR as well for up to three consecutive days (days +1,+2+3) and then weekly until week eight postinjection. The PRL level was also measured at weeks four (+4 h), five (-24,-12h; -6-5 min;-3

texts.full_text: I compiled PHP-7.0.0RC1 with pthreads in Debian completely without any error according to http://php.net/manual/en/pthreads.installation.php and https://github.com/krakjoe/pthreads/blob/master/README.md, but when I try to run a simple multithreaded script using the `Thread` class from pthreads extension, it throws an error saying that "Class 'Thread' not found". I have checked my php.ini file and confirmed that the pthreads.so extension is enabled. Also, I ran `php -m` command which lists all loaded modules including pthreads. my Debian version is 8.2 (jessie) with PHP-7.0.0RC1 compiled from source code using `./configure --enable-maintainer-zts --enable-pthreads` command and then made and installed it without any issues, but still I'm facing this problem of "C

texts.full_text: L *url = [NSURL URLWithString:urlstring]; NSData *data = [NSData dataWithContentsOfURL:url]; Image.image = [UIImage imageWithData:data]; To: dispatch_queue_t myqueue = dispatch_queue_create("myqueue", NULL); // execute a task on that queue asynchronously dispatch_async(myqueue, ^{ NSURL *url = [NSURL URLWithString:[urlstring stringByAddingPercentEscapesUsingEncoding:NSUTF8StringEncoding]];; NSData *data = [NSData dataWithContentsOfURL:url]; dispatch_async(dispatch_get_main_queue(), ^{ Image.image = [UIImage imageWithData:data]; //UI updates should be done on the main thread }); }); As mentioned by others, an Image Caching library like SDWebImage will help a lot because even with this implementation, you just push the download process

texts.full_text: floating gate layer 104a may not align with each other. When this is the case, the shallow trench isolation regions 108 may not fully isolate the floating gate 114 of each memory cell from each other. Accordingly, one object of the present invention is to provide a method of forming the floating gate of a flash memory unit capable of averting the problem caused by a deviation of floating gate alignment. texts.full_text: sea snail, a marine gastropod mollusk in the family Cancellariidae, the nutmeg snails. Description Distribution References ExternaCancellaria elata: A Comprehensive Overview Taxonomy and Family Placement: - Cancellaria elata belongs to the family Cancellariidae, commonly known as nutmeg snails. This classification places it among marine gastropods characterized by their distinctive shell patterns. Physical Characteristics: - The species exhibits a typical nutmeg snail shell structure, often featuring intricate surface textures and colors that distinguish it from other members of its family. Visual comparisons with similar species can highlight unique features. Habitat and Distribution: - Found in marine environments, particularly on sandy bottoms, Cancellaria elata is distributed across various regions of the world's oceans. Its specific geographic range may include notable coastal areas where it thrives. Ecological Role: - As predators, these snails contribute to controlling populations of small bivalves and other mollusks. Their feeding habits likely influence local ecosystem dynamics by maintaining a balance among prey species. Scientific References: - Key studies on Cancellaria elata's biology and taxonomy are available through academic papers and works by noted authors like Bouchet, Gofas, and others. These sources provide detailed insights into the species' ecological interactions and distribution. Conservation Considerations: - While specific threats to Cancellaria elata aren't widely documented, general marine conservation issue
